intro.subtitle: From ideation to creation and polish—smart support throughout. Long-form serialization, cloud memory, and Agent workflow visualization for efficient, coherent storytelling.
intro.workflowDesc: Ideate → Memory recall (characters, foreshadowing, long-term setup) → Continue writing → QA ⇄ Rewrite → Entity extraction → Memory storage. Every step visible and controllable.
intro.stepsSubtitle: From idea to publish—AI assistant all the way
intro.stepIdeateDesc: AI-assisted brainstorming: ideas and outlines. From keywords to full storylines, continuous inspiration.
intro.stepCreateDesc: Multi-agent co-writing with memory and progressive outlines. One-click chapters and long-form content.
intro.stepOptimizeDesc: Full quality check, character consistency, plot logic and style polish for publish-ready output.
intro.memoryDesc: Entities, facts and atomic notes linked automatically. Cross-chapter characters, foreshadowing and long-term setup at a glance. Click nodes for details.
intro.memoryHint: Click a node for memory details; open Creator to experience the full memory system.
intro.finalSubtitle: Open Creator, create a new or continue a project, and try it out.

creator.welcomeDesc: Ideate, memory recall, continue, QA, polish—orchestrated by task. Entity extraction and memory storage run after each continuation.
creator.welcomeTip: Choose mode: Outline → Chapters → Polish / Chat.
creator.placeholderCreate: Enter theme, e.g. A scientist in a fantasy world
creator.placeholderContinue: Write next chapter, or “Write 10 chapters” for batch
creator.clearCurrentConfirm: Clear all cloud memory for “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
creator.clearAllConfirm: Clear all cloud memory? This will remove memory for all projects and cannot be undone.
creator.noCloudMemory: No cloud memory yet. It will appear here after creation or continuation.
creator.noCloudMemoryConfig: After setting EVERMEMOS_API_KEY, creation and continuation will write and show here.
creator.memoryListHint: 10 per page; scroll or use pager below.
creator.clickNodeHint: Click a node for memory details

ai.title: AI Chat
ai.copyFailed: Copy failed; select and copy manually
